title: vernasolis heterophylla
intro: Vernasolis heterophylla, also known as the variable-leaved vernalis, is a species of flowering plant in the family Ranunculaceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Vernasolis heterophylla include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and reduce fever. Herbal preparations of Vernasolis heterophylla include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
